feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through a life with yuri in heart

entry.title: Section 1. Flightless Witch. ②
entry.summary: When I woke up, I felt as though being under the water. It was a little distinct a sensation of sinking below the water surface, or of deep-sea fish. Whereas suffocating, I cannot arise upwards. Whilst screaming out, my voice does not reach anywhere. The light is far away, I struggle, but my body is too heavy. When, at the end, “Oh, well,” I find myself compromising amid that space. Upon some place, however, I would interrupt myself. Saying: “It’s no good!” That myself then would cast a spell upon me. Saying: “I wish today you will be the best of myself.”

entry.title: Intro. That Child that I Hate.

link.title: Intro. That Child that I Hate.

entry.title: Blossom of Sakura Drop. By Saki Shido.

link.title: Blossom of Sakura Drop. By Saki Shido.

entry.summary: Wrapped in a pale pink hoodie, her hands were shoved within a pockets of pair of ankles-length jeans, which were unsealing her feet just a little too much, she stretched her spine straight whereas fixedly gazing upwards. The sharp winds of the winter had turned rotund and mild, as though the warmth of the spring had harvested its edges. Her short, shortcut hair was swaying as though being softly stroked by a fingertips.

entry.title: Two Lilies Bloom upon a Wordless Roof. By Kannazuki.

link.title: Two Lilies Bloom upon a Wordless Roof. By Kannazuki.

entry.summary: Selective mutism. The condition that began revealing itself to me in elementary school. Whereas wishing to speak, I cannot. Whereas I conversed with my family normally, at a school I grew all nervous and stiff. The desired words were not reaching a voice. My throat shut them. Whereas wanting to get along with various a people, chatting a lot, and laughing. I just cannot do that.

entry.title: EX05. Looming Bell Pepper Crisis.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: Yuuyami had been customary viewing the Lydia’s dining scene. Within the library rest space, Lydia was stuffing her cheeks up. Basically, Lydia subsist on​ nothing but vegetables. When, in spite of beyond a half of the salad had remained, Lydia laid a fork down.

entry.title: EX04. Love, Forgiveness, and Apricot.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: “Why–, Apricot, today play was nice as always.”

entry.title: EX03. Bouquet of Weiss Lilies ／ Name of C-chan.

link.title: EX03. Bouquet of Weiss Lilies ／ Name of C-chan.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: The day as Lydia has been yet “the girl,” and Yuuyami “the lady.”
